capabilities: Combine distributed transaction management with agent planning to ensure robust and coherent process execution across systems.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from Saga Pattern and agent planning by applying a field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) ≠ hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log.
Assert the merged output for consistency by asserting all required fields pass JSON Schema draft-07 validation; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field.

Filter transaction candidates by executing a domain-specific query that identifies potential transaction initiators; log candidate IDs and query execution time to candidate_log by applying a predicate filter with threshold score > 0.6 on each candidate record; discard records below threshold and log detection_count; assert false_positive_rate < 0.05.
Assign transaction results by applying a machine learning model trained on historical transaction data; assert model confidence > 0.9 and log classification results to classification_log.

Log operation duration and result code for each transaction step to an audit trail using a structured logging format; ensure logs are indexed and searchable within 5 minutes of generation using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate Saga Pattern for distributed transactions with agent planning derived knowledge base by merging workflows and aligning shared steps for seamless operation.
title: Saga Pattern Integration

failureConditions: Inconsistent transaction states when merge omits NULL handling: records with NULL key fields are silently dropped, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Inaccurate transaction classification when model confidence threshold is not met, causing misclassification and incorrect downstream processing.
Delayed log indexing when logging infrastructure is misconfigured, causing delays in audit trail availability and hindering real-time monitoring.
metrics: the merged output for consistency by asserting all required fields pass JSON Schema draft-07 validation
model confidence > 0.9 and log classification results to classification_log
